MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assignment by the Department of the PJ. for Court Trial Prove-up hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha/ V. Mack, CSR: Valerie Papale.
09:45 a.m. - Plaintiff, Arlene Campbell present in pro per. No appearance by the Defendant.
Preliminary issue, due to the out standing sanction against the plaintiff, the Court take this matter off the Trial Calendar.
OSC will be set in Dept. 212 on Jan. 26, 2004 at 1:00 p.m. for failure to pay the sanction.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to plaintiff Arlene Campbell, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered plaintiff sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Floyd Butler. CSR#2518. (212)
